message:
fix(try-except): Preserve written_outer_vars renames in nested try blocks

When nested try blocks share variables (like sys_exception), the inner
try was clearing the outer try's rename mapping. This caused the inner
try's helper call to use raw variable names instead of the renamed
parameter versions.

This fix saves and restores written_outer_vars renames, similar to how
read_only_vars renames are already handled.

Note: This is a partial fix. Full resolution requires fixing the scope
analyzer to detect all escaping variables in complex except* patterns.

Tests passing:
- test_exception_variations.py: 90 tests OK
